author: codex

patch.value: Add opt-in breaking-changes, suggest-semver, body-preview, and emoji-prefix flags
Four strictly opt-in enhancements for pm-changelog; default output stays byte-identical.

message: Create feature for opt-in changelog enhancements

patch.value: Implemented and tested; default output byte-identical.

value.author: codex
value.text: Bugfix (2026-06-04): --body-preview read only item.body, but pm items store prose in description (body usually empty) → silent no-op against real workspaces. Fixed in src/generator.ts to prefer a non-empty body then fall back to item.description; added description? to PmItem. Strictly additive — default output byte-identical (limit 0 early-return). 79 tests pass. Branch fix-changelog-body-preview-description, PR #29.
